creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Oclair from comment #0)
> Package 'pthread-stubs', required by 'xcb', not found

See ports a387409d2b1a.

Partial upgrades are not supported. Make sure all dependencies are up-to-date (or in sync) before building any ports. Poudriere and portmaster do this automatically.
